subcodes.first_line: The decree hath indeed come from God, the Omnipotent, the Mighty, the All-Knowing, commanding My departure from that land, and We are therefore filled with gratitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد جاء الامر من الله المقتدر العزیز العلیم بخروجی عن تلک الارض و نحن اذا فی شکر
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @call to action, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
